name: Apple Pizza Dessert
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Frozen bread dough; thawed (1/2 frozen loaf)
4 cups Apples; peel and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------TOPPING----------------------------------
1/3 cup Flour
1/3 cup Brown sugar
2 tablespoons Margarine; softened
1/2 cup Slivered almonds
Place bread dough on greased 12-inch deep dish pizza pan. When thawed completely, pat dough onto the bottom and up the sides of the pan. Let rest for 15 minutes.
Combine cream cheese, 1/4 cup sugar, egg, and vanilla until smooth. Spread over the bottom of the crust. Combine apples, 2/3 cup sugar, 1/4 cup flour, and cinnamon. Arrange evenly over the cream cheese mixture.
In a small mixing bowl, combine 1/3 cup flour and brown sugar. Cut in margarine until the mixture is crumbly. Add almonds. Sprinkle evenly over the apples.
Bake at 350°F for about 40 minutes, or until golden brown.
Serve warm or cold with whipped cream, whipped topping, or ice cream.
